originalTitle: Riley Green - Think As You Drunk (Lyric Video)
content: The Official Lyric Video for "Think As You Drunk" by Riley Green. https://www.x.com/RileyGreenMusic LYRICS: Just who the hell do you think you are I pay the light bill in this bar Hey, whatcha mean you gonna cut me off Just shut up and give me that beer I bought I got no idea who took my keys Or who put lipstick on my cheek I know I might come off whiskey bent You’re probably thinking I’m three sheets to the wind I ain’t as think as you drunk I am Don’t pay no mind to this mountain of crushed up cans No, I can’t say my C B A’s But I can sing ya every song that jukebox plays And I know I can’t stand or sit But if I was hammered, could I dance like this Might have a cold one in each hand But I ain’t as think as you drunk I am Honey, to be honest I’ve had me a few I mighta danced with a cowgirl or two I mighta left my left boot at the bar You mighta seen me laying out in the yard But I ain’t as think as you drunk I am Don’t pay no mind to this mountain of crushed up cans No, I can’t say my C B As But I can sing ya every song that jukebox plays Yeah, I know I can’t stand or sit But if I was hammered, could I dance like this Might have a cold one in each hand But I ain’t as think as you drunk I am Well, I mighta started drinking at noon But this honky tonk don’t close till 2 And I ain’t as think as you drunk I am Don’t pay no mind to this mountain of crushed up cans No, I can’t say my C B As But I can sing ya every song that jukebox plays And I know I can’t stand for shit But if I was wasted, could I dance like this Might have a cold one in each hand But I ain’t as think as you drunk I am Might have a cold one in all three hands I ain’t as chineseContent: 莱利·格林 (Riley Green) 的“Think As You Drunk”的官方歌词视频。在这里收听：https://rileygreen.ffm.to/thinkasyoudrunk.OYD 有关 Riley Green 的更多信息，请在这里收听：https://rileygreen.ffm.to/riley-green-lumc.OYD 订阅：https://www.youtube.com/@RileyGreenMusic 更多内容 👇 如果我这样做，请不要介意： https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3FxZnLyjSxe6UE6rHhweePbovmbK9hUi 官方音乐视频：https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3FxZnLyjSxf6QTjBN2t1wjH-h9SGFup5 现场表演： https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3FxZnLyjSxdCIr6qzz8yUcU60NfANi37 歌词视频：https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3FxZnLyjSxfRohcUQU__WGcgzubg_P-C 关注 RILEY GREEN 官方网站：https://www.rileygreenmusic.com TikTok： https://www.tiktok.com/@rileyduckman Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rileyduckman Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RileyGreenMusic X: https://www.x.com/RileyGreenMusic 歌词: 你到底以为你是谁 我在这个酒吧付电费 嘿，什么意思你要切断我的联系 闭嘴，把我买的啤酒给我 我不知道谁拿了我的钥匙 或者谁把口红涂在我的脸颊上 我知道我可能会喝掉威士忌酒 你可能在想我是三张风 我并不像你想象的那样喝醉了 不要理会这堆压碎的罐头山 不，我不能说我的 C B A 但我可以唱你点唱机播放的每一首歌 我知道我不能站或坐 但如果我被锤击，我可以像这样跳舞 也许每只手都有一个冰凉的但我不是当你喝醉时我是亲爱的，说实话我已经喝了一些我可能会和一两个女牛仔跳舞我可能会把我的左靴子留在酒吧你可能会看到我躺在院子里但我并不像你喝醉时那样想我是不要理会这堆压碎的罐头山不，我不能说我的C B
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
